title: Kuro’s Crew Clashes With the Straw Hats
description: On pages 1–4, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: How did he knock Captain Kuro down...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hit him hit him hit him....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You damn pirate! Trying to disrupt the peace of our village!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WaH...!! What the hell are those kids doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: OK! We'll have mercy on him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What are those kids trying to do?

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
